View.Name: {FCA78AED-8A10-4C86-A88C-37E87AD83F8C}
View.CustomFormatter: {"kanbanProps":{"hideSelection":false,"formatter":{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"sp-card-container sp-card-container-noPadding"},"children":[{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"ms-bgColor-white sp-css-borderColor-neutralLight sp-card-borderHighlight sp-card-subContainer sp-card-subContainer-borderRadius"},"children":[{"elmType":"div","children":[{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"class":"ms-fontColor-neutralSecondary sp-card-label sp-card-boldText"},"txtContent":"[!Participant.DisplayName]"},{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"sp-card-content sp-card-highlightedContent","role":"heading","aria-level":"3"},"children":[{"elmType":"p","txtContent":"=if(length([$Participant]) == 0, '–', '')"},{"forEach":"lookupIterator in [$Participant]","elmType":"a","attributes":{"target":"_blank","class":"ms-fontColor-neutralPrimary sp-card-urlContent sp-card-lookupInlineValues sp-card-keyboard-focusable sp-card-highlightedContent","href":{"operator":"+","operands":["&ID=","[$lookupIterator.lookupId]"]}},"txtContent":"[$lookupIterator.lookupValue]"}]}],"attributes":{"class":"sp-card-displayColumnContainer"}},{"elmType":"div","style":{"display":"=if(length([$PrimaryContact]) == 0, 'none', '')"},"children":[{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"class":"ms-fontColor-neutralSecondary sp-card-label sp-card-boldText"},"txtContent":"[!PrimaryContact.DisplayName]"},{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"sp-card-content "},"children":[{"elmType":"p","txtContent":"=if(length([$PrimaryContact]) == 0, '–', '')"},{"forEach":"lookupIterator in [$PrimaryContact]","elmType":"a","attributes":{"target":"_blank","class":"ms-fontColor-neutralPrimary sp-card-urlContent sp-card-lookupInlineValues sp-card-keyboard-focusable ","href":{"operator":"+","operands":["&ID=","[$lookupIterator.lookupId]"]}},"txtContent":"[$lookupIterator.lookupValue]"}]}],"attributes":{"class":"sp-card-displayColumnContainer"}},{"elmType":"div","style":{"display":"=if ([$Award.displayValue] == '','none', ''"},"children":[{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"class":"ms-fontColor-neutralSecondary sp-card-label sp-card-boldText"},"txtContent":"[!Award.DisplayName]"},{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"title":"=if ([$Award.displayValue] == '', '–', [$Award.displayValue])","class":"ms-fontColor-neutralPrimary sp-card-content "},"txtContent":"=if ([$Award.displayValue] == '', '–', [$Award.displayValue])"}],"attributes":{"class":"sp-card-displayColumnContainer"}},{"elmType":"div","style":{"display":"=if ([$Expenses.displayValue] == '','none', ''"},"children":[{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"class":"ms-fontColor-neutralSecondary sp-card-label sp-card-boldText"},"txtContent":"[!Expenses.DisplayName]"},{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"title":"=if ([$Expenses.displayValue] == '', '–', [$Expenses.displayValue])","class":"ms-fontColor-neutralPrimary sp-card-content "},"txtContent":"=if ([$Expenses.displayValue] == '', '–', [$Expenses.displayValue])"}],"attributes":{"class":"sp-card-displayColumnContainer"}},{"elmType":"div","style":{"display":"=if(length([$ProgramCycle]) == 0, 'none', '')"},"children":[{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"class":"ms-fontColor-neutralSecondary sp-card-label sp-card-boldText"},"txtContent":"[!ProgramCycle.DisplayName]"},{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"sp-card-content "},"children":[{"elmType":"p","txtContent":"=if(length([$ProgramCycle]) == 0, '–', '')"},{"forEach":"lookupIterator in [$ProgramCycle]","elmType":"a","attributes":{"target":"_blank","class":"ms-fontColor-neutralPrimary sp-card-urlContent sp-card-lookupInlineValues sp-card-keyboard-focusable ","href":{"operator":"+","operands":["&ID=","[$lookupIterator.lookupId]"]}},"txtContent":"[$lookupIterator.lookupValue]"}]}],"attributes":{"class":"sp-card-displayColumnContainer"}},{"elmType":"div","style":{"display":"=if ([$ApprovalStatus] == '', 'none', '')"},"children":[{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"class":"ms-fontColor-neutralSecondary sp-card-label sp-card-boldText"},"txtContent":"[!ApprovalStatus.DisplayName]"},{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"sp-card-content sp-card-formatterRef"},"children":[{"columnFormatterReference":"[$ApprovalStatus]"}]}],"attributes":{"class":"sp-card-displayColumnContainer"}},{"elmType":"div","style":{"display":"=if ([$FollowUpDate.displayValue] == '','none', ''"},"children":[{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"class":"ms-fontColor-neutralSecondary sp-card-label sp-card-boldText"},"txtContent":"[!FollowUpDate.DisplayName]"},{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"title":"=if ([$FollowUpDate.displayValue] == '', '–', [$FollowUpDate.displayValue])","class":"ms-fontColor-neutralPrimary sp-card-content "},"txtContent":"=if ([$FollowUpDate.displayValue] == '', '–', [$FollowUpDate.displayValue])"}],"attributes":{"class":"sp-card-displayColumnContainer"}},{"elmType":"div","style":{"display":"=if(length([$Assignee]) == 0, 'none', '')"},"children":[{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"class":"ms-fontColor-neutralSecondary sp-card-label sp-card-boldText"},"txtContent":"[!Assignee.DisplayName]"},{"elmType":"div","style":{"display":"flex"},"children":[{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"class":"sp-card-userEmptyText"},"txtContent":"=if(length([$Assignee]) == 0, '–', '')"},{"forEach":"personIterator in [$Assignee]","elmType":"a","attributes":{"class":"=if(loopIndex('personIterator') >= 5, 'sp-card-userContainer', 'sp-card-userContainer sp-card-keyboard-focusable')"},"style":{"display":"=if(loopIndex('personIterator') >= 5, 'none', '')"},"defaultHoverField":"[$personIterator]","children":[{"elmType":"img","attributes":{"src":"=getUserImage([$personIterator.email], 'S')","alt":"[$personIterator.title]","title":"[$personIterator.title]","class":"sp-card-userThumbnail"},"style":{"display":"=if(length([$Assignee]) > 5 && loopIndex('personIterator') >= 4, 'none', '')"}},{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"ms-bgColor-neutralLight ms-fontColor-neutralSecondary sp-card-userOthers"},"style":{"display":"=if(length([$Assignee]) > 5 && loopIndex('personIterator') == 4, '', 'none')"},"customCardProps":{"formatter":{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"sp-card-personCallout"},"children":[{"forEach":"personIterator in [$Assignee]","elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"sp-card-userContainer sp-card-userCustomCard"},"style":{"display":"=if(loopIndex('personIterator') < 4, 'none', '')"},"children":[{"elmType":"img","defaultHoverField":"[$personIterator]","attributes":{"src":"=getUserImage([$personIterator.email], 'S')","title":"[$personIterator.title]","class":"sp-card-userThumbnail"}}]}]},"openOnEvent":"hover"},"children":[{"elmType":"span","txtContent":"='+' + toString(length([$Assignee]) - (4))"}]}]},{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"sp-card-userTitle sp-card-keyboard-focusable"},"style":{"display":"=if(length([$Assignee]) == 1, '', 'none')"},"defaultHoverField":"[$personIterator]","txtContent":"[$Assignee.title]"}]}],"attributes":{"class":"sp-card-previewColumnContainer"}}]}],"templateId":"KanbanCardDesigner100"},"designerConfig":[1,0,"Participant",0,"PrimaryContact",0,"Award",0,"Expenses",0,"ProgramCycle",0,"ApprovalStatus",0,"FollowUpDate",1,"Assignee"]}}
